hooks.command: S=.claude/.precommit-check-ok; if [ -f "$S" ] && [ -n "$(find "$S" -mmin -30 2>/dev/null)" ]; then rm -f "$S"; exit 0; fi; printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Run /precommit-check before committing. It reviews the staged diff, logs findings to BUGS.md, and asks which to fix. After it completes, retry the commit."}}'

if git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; S=.claude/.precommit-check-ok; if [ -f "$S" ] && [ -n "$(find "$S" -mmin -30 2>/dev/null)" ]; then exit 0; fi; printf '%s' '{"systemMessage":"Staged changes detected and /precommit-check has not run. Run /precommit-check before committing."}'
